The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] '''Cruiser''' was a naval artillery vessel with large mounted cannons, developed for shelling shore installations and enemy fleets.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
